VehicleListing.title: VehicleListing
VehicleListing.description: Represents a vehicle listing in the Motores Zone application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the vehicle listing.

sellerId.description: Reference to the Seller. (Relationship: Seller 1:N VehicleListing)

make.description: The make of the vehicle (e.g., Toyota).

model.description: The model of the vehicle (e.g., Corolla).

year.description: The year the vehicle was manufactured.

priceUSD.description: The price of the vehicle in USD.

description.description: A detailed description of the vehicle.

imageUrls.description: URLs of the images associated with the vehicle listing.

summary.description: AI-generated summary of the vehicle listing.

Seller.title: Seller
Seller.description: Represents a seller on the Motores Zone application.

phoneNumber.description: The seller's phone number (for verification purposes).

isVerified.description: Indicates whether the seller has been verified.

ExchangeRate.title: ExchangeRate
ExchangeRate.description: Represents the official BCV exchange rate between USD and VES.

id.description: Unique identifier for the exchange rate entry.

rate.description: The exchange rate of USD to VES.

effectiveDate.description: The date when this exchange rate became effective.

definition.description: Stores seller profiles. Each seller profile is stored under the user's ID. This supports path-based ownership.

params.name: userId
params.description: The ID of the user who owns this seller profile.

definition.description: Stores vehicle listings.  Includes 'sellerId' for authorization independence.

params.name: vehicleListingId
params.description: The unique ID of the vehicle listing.

definition.description: Stores exchange rates. No access control constraints specified, so no additional fields are required.

params.name: exchangeRateId
params.description: The unique ID of the exchange rate entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure is designed to securely manage vehicle listings, seller information, and currency exchange rates for the Motores Zone application. The structure prioritizes authorization independence and supports efficient querying.

*   **/users/{userId}/seller_profile:** Stores seller profiles, ensuring ownership-based access control.
*   **/vehicle_listings/{vehicleListingId}:** Stores vehicle listings. The `sellerId` field enables querying listings by seller.
*   **/exchange_rates/{exchangeRateId}:** Stores exchange rates. As there are no access restrictions in the prompt, and these are global values, no access control is implemented.

**Authorization Independence (CRITICAL):** The structure is designed to minimize the need for `get()` calls in security rules, thus ensuring authorization independence.

*   Vehicle listings have a `sellerId` field that directly links to the user who owns the listing. This removes the need to perform a `get()` operation to fetch the seller's ID from a parent document. This satisfies the requirement of denormalization for authorization.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):** The structure enables secure `list` operations by segregating data with different access needs.

*   Path-based ownership for seller profiles (`/users/{userId}/seller_profile`).

This structure ensures a secure, scalable, and debuggable Firestore database for the Motores Zone application.
